1	using System.Collections.Generic;
2	using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components;
3	using MudBlazor.Utilities;
4	
5	namespace MudBlazor
6	{
7	    /// <summary>
8	    /// Represents a series of links used to show the user's current location.
9	    /// </summary>
10	    /// <seealso cref="BreadcrumbItem" />
11	    /// <seealso cref="BreadcrumbLink" />
12	    /// <seealso cref="BreadcrumbSeparator" />
13	    public partial class MudBreadcrumbs : MudComponentBase
14	    {
15	        private string Classname => new CssBuilder("mud-breadcrumbs")
16	            .AddClass("mud-typography-body1")
17	            .AddClass(Class)
18	            .Build();
19	
20	        /// <summary>
21	        /// The list of items to display.
22	        /// </summary>
23	        [Parameter]
24	        [Category(CategoryTypes.Breadcrumbs.Behavior)]
25	        public IReadOnlyList<BreadcrumbItem>? Items { get; set; }
26	
27	        /// <summary>
28	        /// The separator shown between items.
29	        /// </summary>
30	        /// <remarks>
31	        /// Defaults to <c>/</c>.  Will not be shown if <see cref="SeparatorTemplate"/> is set.
32	        /// </remarks>
33	        [Parameter]
34	        [Category(CategoryTypes.Breadcrumbs.Appearance)]
35	        public string Separator { get; set; } = "/";
36	
37	        /// <summary>
38	        /// The content shown between items.
39	        /// </summary>
40	        [Parameter]
41	        [Category(CategoryTypes.Breadcrumbs.Appearance)]
42	        public RenderFragment? SeparatorTemplate { get; set; }
43	
44	        /// <summary>
45	        /// The custom template used to display items.
46	        /// </summary>
47	        [Parameter]
48	        [Category(CategoryTypes.Breadcrumbs.Behavior)]
49	        public RenderFragment<BreadcrumbItem>? ItemTemplate { get; set; }
50	
51	        /// <summary>
52	        /// The maximum number of items to display.
53	        /// </summary>
54	        /// <remarks>
55	        /// Defaults to <c>null</c>.  If <see cref="Collapsed"/> is <c>true</c> and the number of items exceeds this value, the breadcrumbs will automatically collapse.
56	        /// </remarks>
57	        [Parameter]
58	        [Category(CategoryTypes.Breadcrumbs.Behavior)]
59	        public byte? MaxItems { get; set; }
60	
61	        /// <summary>
62	        /// The icon to display when items are collapsed.
63	        /// </summary>
64	        /// <remarks>
65	        /// Defaults to <see cref="Icons.Material.Filled.SettingsEthernet" />.  Displays when <see cref="Collapsed"/> and the number of items exceeds <see cref="MaxItems"/>.
66	        /// </remarks>
67	        [Parameter]
68	        [Category(CategoryTypes.Breadcrumbs.Appearance)]
69	        public string ExpanderIcon { get; set; } = Icons.Material.Filled.SettingsEthernet;
70	
71	        /// <summary>
72	        /// Collapses items when the number of items exceeds <see cref="MaxItems"/>.
73	        /// </summary>
74	        /// <remarks>
75	        /// Defaults to <c>true</c>.
76	        /// </remarks>
77	        public bool Collapsed { get; private set; } = true;
78	
79	        internal static string GetItemClassname(BreadcrumbItem item)
80	        {
81	            return new CssBuilder("mud-breadcrumb-item")
82	                .AddClass("mud-disabled", item.Disabled)
83	                .Build();
84	        }
85	
86	        internal void Expand()
87	        {
88	            if (!Collapsed)
89	            {
90	                return;
91	            }
92	
93	            Collapsed = false;
94	            StateHasChanged();
95	        }
96	    }
97	}
98

content.content: M src/MudBlazor/Components/Breadcrumbs/MudBreadcrumbs.razor

content.text:
Implemented the accessibility fix for `MudBreadcrumbs`.

Changed:
- `src/MudBlazor/Components/Breadcrumbs/MudBreadcrumbs.razor`
  - Updated the breadcrumb wrapper from:
    ```razor
    <nav>
    ```
    to:
    ```razor
    <nav aria-label="Breadcrumb">
    ```

Validation performed:
- Added a temporary focused regression test confirming `nav` has `aria-label="Breadcrumb"`.
- Ran it before the fix and confirmed it failed.
- Applied the fix.
- Reran the focused test and confirmed it passed.
- Removed the temporary test afterward as requested.

Final working tree only contains the intended source change:
- `M src/MudBlazor/Components/Breadcrumbs/MudBreadcrumbs.razor`
